seo.title: Jane Doe - Full-Stack Developer & Creative Technologist

seo.keywords: full-stack developer, react developer, typescript, web development, portfolio, creative technologist
seo.author: Jane Doe

hero.name: Jane Doe
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer & Creative Technologist
hero.tagline: Building elegant solutions with modern web technologies

about.paragraph: I'm a passionate developer with 5+ years of experience crafting responsive web applications. I specialize in React, TypeScript, and modern UI/UX design patterns. My goal is to create digital experiences that are not only functional but also delightful to use.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.summary: A full-featured online store with real-time inventory management and secure payment integration.
projects.shortDescription: Built a scalable e-commerce solution serving 10k+ monthly users with seamless checkout experience.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.summary: Collaborative task tracker with real-time updates and team management features.
projects.shortDescription: A productivity tool helping teams organize workflows with drag-and-drop interfaces.

projects.title: Weather Dashboard
projects.summary: Beautiful weather visualization with forecasts and interactive maps.
projects.shortDescription: Real-time weather data presented through stunning visualizations and animations.

testimonials.name: John Smith
testimonials.content: Jane delivered exceptional work on our e-commerce platform. Her attention to detail and technical expertise made the project a huge success.

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.content: Working with Jane was a pleasure. She transformed our ideas into a beautiful, functional application that exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.content: Highly skilled developer who brings creativity and professionalism to every project. Would definitely work with her again!

timeline.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer
timeline.description: Leading development of enterprise-level web applications. Managing a team of 5 developers and architecting scalable solutions.

timeline.title: Full-Stack Developer
timeline.description: Developed and maintained multiple client projects using React, Node.js, and cloud technologies. Improved application performance by 40%.

timeline.title: Frontend Developer
timeline.description: Built responsive web applications and interactive user interfaces. Collaborated with designers to create pixel-perfect implementations.

timeline.title: Bachelor of Computer Science
timeline.description: Graduated with honors. Focus on software engineering, web technologies, and human-computer interaction.
